creator: corecode@corecode.ath.cx
text:
something crazy is going on.
i didn't resend this PR tho it is exactly the same as ports/32972.
there must something have happened while being sent to securityfocus as CC
(original message got posted so it didn't bounce... must have been a reply
or similar) so remember for the future: never cc a list ;]

well the "original" PR (ports/32972) has already beed closed as being
superceded by ports/33003 so i assume this should be closed too.

cheerz
  corecode
